mapper.insert: INSERT INTO iot_alarm_notify_delivery( tenant_id, org_id, notify_config_id, rule_id, alarm_event_id, alarm_event_type, channel, status, vendor_code, http_status, error_message, recipient_hint, is_test, is_delete, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{orgId}, #{notifyConfigId}, #{ruleId}, #{alarmEventId}, #{alarmEventType}, #{channel}, #{status}, #{vendorCode}, #{httpStatus}, #{errorMessage}, #{recipientHint}, #{isTest}, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
